todos.content: Fix quote loading for Solana destination - missing recipient causes quote failure
Fix batch quote - pass recipient when destination is Solana
Fix batch token display - show all wallet tokens with balances, add select/deselect UI
Fix fetchBatchQuote - uses address (EVM) even when destination is Solana, needs solanaAddress as recipient
Run diagnostics to verify no type errors
